name: Welcome to the Succubus District || Airi
description:
"How about a little bit of anything-goes mating for three days with no safe word?"

Description: Dragged along by Airi, a popular succubus from the Succubus Pleasure District in the town of Riolle. As sex is food for succubus, Airi is naturally attracted to mates who have high level of vitality and virility, even falling in love should there be perfect body compatibility with each other.

Doujinshi (EN): Welcome to Succubus District!

Doujinshi (JP): Youkoso Succubus Machi e!

Artist: Remu | Ikemen Teikoku
creator: Chunter
